message:
feat(compat): add conformance suites 040-049 and apply clippy Self/closure lint fixes

Add conformance test suites covering:
- 040: CREATE INDEX, DROP INDEX, UNIQUE INDEX, IF NOT EXISTS
- 041: Triggers (AFTER INSERT, BEFORE INSERT, DROP TRIGGER)
- 042: AUTOINCREMENT (basic sequencing, sqlite_sequence tracking,
  post-delete rowid reuse detection)
- 043: DEFAULT values (literal, NULL, override)
- 044: Multi-column ORDER BY (expression, alias, column index)
- 048: Math functions (abs, round, sign, trig, inverse trig,
  hyperbolic, sqrt, pow, exp, ln, log variants, ceil/floor/trunc,
  degrees/radians, mod, atan2, pi, NULL propagation, table pipeline)
- 049: String functions and typeof

Update REPLACE INTO conformance test ignore reason to reflect the
actual blocker (MVCC Busy on 3-column tables, not missing
implementation).

Apply clippy lint fixes across compat crate: use Self instead of
concrete type names in From/FromSqliteValue impls, pass closures
directly instead of wrapping in lambdas, remove unnecessary mut on
closure parameters.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
